products.title: Products
settings.apiKeyHelp: Get this from soflo.codify.tech → register your store → copy the API key
settings.appleDevicesHint: Works on iOS, macOS, and some Android devices with mDNS support. Requires Bonjour/mDNS enabled on your router.
settings.autoPrintBillHint: Print bill when payment is completed
settings.autoPrintKotHint: Print KOT when order is placed
settings.billTemplateClassicDesc: Personalized layout with customer name/mobile, addon details, discounts, and loyalty points earned/balance. Best for dine-in.
settings.billTemplateCompactDesc: Minimal, fast layout. One line per item. Ideal for quick service and takeaway.
settings.billTemplateDetailedDesc: Full GST compliance with GSTIN header, TAX INVOICE label, and per-rate tax breakdown.
settings.connectionFailed: Connection failed — check key and server
settings.createBackupHint: Create a complete backup of your SQLite database file.
settings.customerMandatoryHint: Require customer selection before placing an order
settings.defaultPrinterTipBody: The default printer is used for auto-print KOT and bill. Set one printer as default, then configure auto-print in Print Options.
settings.devModeDisabled: Update checking is disabled in development mode.
settings.disconnectDevicesWarning: Generating a new code will disconnect all currently paired devices.
settings.enableOnlineOrderPolling: Enable online order polling from OrderFlow
settings.enablePrinterHint: Connect to thermal printer via USB/Bluetooth
settings.enableWhatsappHint: Send bill details via WhatsApp after payment
settings.enableWhatsappShareHint: Send bill details via WhatsApp after payment
settings.exportDatabaseHint: Export your entire database as a JSON file. This includes all products, orders, customers, and settings.
settings.floadminSalesReportingHint: Push every paid bill to the cloud so the ReFlo mobile app can show live reports
settings.footerMessageHint: Printed at the bottom of every bill
settings.howItWorksBody: Flo runs an embedded HTTP server on port 3001. The KDS page at /kds connects via WebSocket for real-time order updates. No app install needed — just a modern browser on the same network.
settings.importDatabaseHint: Import data from a Flo Desktop export file. Choose to merge with existing data or replace all data.
settings.importOverwriteConfirm: Do you want to replace ALL existing data? Click Cancel to merge instead.
settings.initializeDatabaseDescription: Permanently wipes every product, order, customer, and setting, and resets to a blank install. A backup is created automatically beforehand.
settings.initializeDialogBackup: A backup is created automatically before anything is deleted.
settings.initializeDialogBody: This permanently deletes every product, order, customer, and setting, and resets the database to a blank install. You'll go through first-run setup again afterward.
settings.initializeMasterPinPrompt: Enter your device Master PIN to permanently initialize the database.
settings.instagramHandleHint: Shown on printed bills, if set
settings.instagramHint: Shown on printed bills, if set
settings.kdsPairingHint: Open a browser on any tablet or monitor on the same WiFi and scan the QR code (or type the URL) to connect it as a Kitchen Display.
settings.loyaltyHint: Customers earn points based on each item' cashback % in the cart
settings.masterPinDataDescription: A 4-digit PIN, separate from any staff login, required to back up, restore, or initialize this database. Stored encrypted on this device, independent of the database itself — so you can still use it even if the database is corrupted or locked.
settings.databaseHealthCheckDescription: Compares this database's structure against what the app expects, and proposes fixes — showing the risk of data loss for each one before anything changes.
settings.masterPinRequiredForBackup: Set a Master PIN below before creating a backup
settings.masterPinRequiredForReplace: Set a Master PIN below before replacing all data
settings.mobileAppHint: Connect the Flo mobile app to view reports and sales on your phone. Enter this code in the app to pair it with your account.
settings.moreAppsHint: Companion apps for the Flo POS family. Scan a QR code with your phone to download.
settings.name: Name
settings.noInstalledPrinters: No installed printers found. Install your printer via system settings, then click Refresh — or use Add Manually for a network printer.
settings.orderflowOnlineOrdersHint: Receive orders from Zomato, Swiggy, and other platforms directly in this POS
settings.orderflowStep2: 2. Give Zomato/Swiggy your webhook URL (shown after registering)
settings.orderflowStep3: 3. Enable online orders below — POS will poll every 5 seconds and show a notification for each new order
settings.phoneDigitsHint: Required digit count for phone validation (e.g. {count} for {country})
settings.phoneDigitsDerived: Phone digit count is automatically derived from the country selected above.
settings.printBillOnPayment: Print bill when payment is completed
settings.printKotOnPlace: Print KOT when order is placed
settings.printMethodBrowserHint: Opens the browser print dialog — works with any printer on this computer
settings.printMethodEscposHint: Direct USB printing via WebUSB — connect the printer from the POS toolbar
settings.printerHint: Click Add on an installed printer, or use Add Manually.
settings.printerUnicodeHint: If ON, prints currency symbols (₹, €, £, ¥…) as-is. If OFF, replaces them with ASCII (Rs, EUR, GBP, Yen…) — safer default for most thermal printers.
settings.registrationContactSupport: Contact support — this install was not approved
settings.registrationLastFailed: Last attempt failed — will keep retrying automatically
settings.registrationRegisterHelp: Register to announce this POS to FloAdmin, or paste an API key below
settings.requireApprovalHint: Require manager PIN to apply discounts
settings.showProductImagesHint: Display product images in the POS grid
settings.softwareUpdatesHintDefault: Flo Desktop checks for updates automatically. You can also check manually below.
settings.softwareUpdatesHintStore: This version is distributed via the App Store. Updates are managed by the store.
settings.storeIdPending: Store ID {id} — a FloAdmin team member needs to claim this install
settings.title: Settings
settings.aboutDescription: FloPOS is a free forever, open-source restaurant POS for cafes, restaurants, bakeries, food trucks, cloud kitchens, and bars. It includes ordering, tables, menus, kitchen display, receipt printing, staff access, and local data storage. Download it, run service, keep your data, and own your POS.
settings.unsavedChangesPrompt: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?
settings.webusbHint: WebUSB printers are connected directly from the browser via the toolbar Connect button. Save this entry to remember the paper width preference.
setup.chooseCountryHint: FloCafe uses your country to pick the right currency, tax format, and demo data.
setup.chooseLanguageHint: Pick the language for this setup flow before choosing the country.
setup.demoDesc: Sample data for training and testing.
setup.demoDetails: Seeds products, tables, sample customers, and staff users so the client can explore the system.
setup.emptyDesc: Owner account and required settings only.
setup.emptyDetails: Use this when the client wants to enter every product, table, and customer manually.
setup.errorNameRequired: Name, email, and password are required
setup.errorTermsRequired: You must agree to the Terms and Conditions, Privacy Policy, and No Warranty Disclaimer to continue
setup.expressDetails: Seeds basic food and beverage categories, a few starter products, and tables for FineDine.
setup.finedineDetails: Best for restaurants that seat guests, manage tables, and collect payment after service.
setup.flowSubtitle: FloCafe is restaurant-only. Pick the billing model for this outlet.
setup.masterPinNotAvailable: Master PIN protection isn't available on this device. You can continue without it.
setup.masterPinRequired: Set a 4-digit Master PIN to continue
setup.ownerSubtitle: This first user gets full owner access on this POS.
setup.qsrDetails: Best for quick-service restaurants where payment is taken before fulfilment.
setup.setMasterPinDescription: A 4-digit PIN known only to you, required to back up, restore, or initialize this database — separate from your login password. If you forget it, you can reset it later from Settings while logged in as owner.
setup.setupDataSubtitle: Select how much data should be created on first launch.
setup.tagline: Create the owner account and choose the restaurant setup.
staff.pinHint: Used for manager approvals (cancelling orders, etc.)
staff.title: Staff
tables.noTablesYet: No tables yet. Add your first table!
tables.title: Tables
addonGroups.deleteGroupConfirm: Delete this addon group and all its addons?
addonGroups.minExceedsAvailable: Minimum selection cannot exceed the number of available addons ({count})
addonGroups.minExceedsMax: Minimum selection cannot exceed maximum selection
auth.registerSubtitle: Create your account and set up your restaurant
common.appDescription: Smart Point of Sale for restaurants
kds.emptyHint: Items will appear here when their status changes
kds.loginHint: Only chef, manager, or owner roles can access the kitchen display.
kds.loginSubtitle: Sign in with your kitchen staff account
kds.title: Kitchen Display
orders.cartClearConfirm: You have items in your active POS cart. Starting a new order will clear them. Proceed?
orders.printReceiptConfirm: Are you sure you want to print this receipt?
orders.receiptPrintFailedHint: Receipt print failed — check printer connection
orders.reprintReceiptWarning: This receipt was already printed. The reprint will be marked with a "REPRINT" banner.
orders.startNewOrderForCustomer: Start new order for this customer
pos.printerBrowserMode: Browser print mode — change in Settings
printTest.browserHint: Uses browser print dialog - works with any printer connected to computer
printTest.escposHint: Status: {status} - Direct USB printing via WebUSB
printTest.title: Printing Test Page
products.cashbackHint: % of item price added to customer's loyalty wallet
products.csvAddonsHelp: Columns: group_name, addon_name, price, group_required (yes/no), group_min_select, group_max_select — group settings are read from the first row with that group name
products.csvCategoriesHelp: Columns: name, description, color (red/green/blue/...), icon (emoji), sort_order
products.csvChooseFile: Click to choose a CSV file
products.csvMissingFields: Some rows had missing fields — imported with defaults
products.csvProductsHelp: Columns: id (leave blank for new items), sku, name, category, price, description, cost, tax_type (none/inclusive/exclusive), tax_rate, cashback_percent, tags (veg/non_veg/...), is_active (yes/no) — download "Current data" to get item IDs, edit, then re-upload to update existing items
products.deleteCategoryBody: "{name}" has {count, plural, one {# active product} other {# active products}}. What would you like to do with them?
settings.applySafeFixes: Apply {count, plural, one {# Safe Fix} other {# Safe Fixes}}
settings.cloudRegistrationPending: Request sent — your API key will arrive by email within 7 days. RevFlo reports and other features unlock once it's applied.
settings.enterMasterPinPrompt: Enter your device Master PIN to continue.
settings.fixesApplied: {count, plural, one {# fix applied} other {# fixes applied}}
settings.healthCheckClean: No issues found — this database matches the expected schema.
settings.healthCheckDescription: Compares this database's structure against what the app expects and flags anything that's missing or unexpected.
settings.healthCheckReviewHint: These are never applied automatically — they may involve removing data or changing a column's type, which this tool will not do on its own.
settings.setMasterPinFirst: Set a Master PIN in Settings → Data before performing this action
settings.setPinDescription: Choose a 4-digit PIN known only to you. It will be required for backups, restores, and initializing the database.
settings.verifyPinDescription: This action requires your device Master PIN.
settings.webusbTestHint: WebUSB: use the Connect button in the POS toolbar to test.
